message: Sentence longer than {max_words} words ({count} wds). Split into shorter sentences (5-7 words each).
Sentence very long ({count} wds). Must split — max 20 words.
Multiple subordinate clauses in one sentence («который», «где», «что», «так как»). Break into shorter sentences.
Run-on sentence with multiple commas joining independent clauses. Use periods.
Too many consecutive short sentences. Vary sentence length.
